description:
Wow - I never thought, this could be a problem, for somebody, who's rank is soo close, to mine... Wierd...

Have fun ;)
sgf:
(;SZ[9]C[What's the correct way, to deal, with 'A'? (NO KOMI)]AW[dd]AW[ed]AW[fd]AW[gd]AW[hc]AW[id]AW[ie]AW[he]AW[cd]AW[be]AW[bf]AB[af]AB[bg]AB[cg]AB[cf]AB[ce]AB[de]AB[ee]AB[fe]AB[ge]AB[hf]AB[gf]AB[if]LB[af:A]GM[1]FF[4]CA[UTF-8]AP[CGoban:2]ST[2]RU[Japanese]KM[0.00]PW[White]PB[Black]PL[W]
(;W[ad]C[Correct. Black can't do more damage, for now - Since, he can't approach at A5. (And in some cases, it can help you make an eye - Remmber, it...)];B[ag]
(;W[ae]C[And white wins by a point - Nice ;)RIGHT])
(;W[bd]C[Jigo(Tie) - Why did you play at B6 instead of A5 - It costed you a point..]))
(;W[bd];B[ae]C[Well - Black gets, to take away, another point...];W[ad];B[ag]C[Jigo (Tie)  - Could be a bit better..])
(;W[ae];B[bd]C[This is wrong, since, A5 is captured. (Don't belive me? See for yourself..)]
(;W[bc];B[ad]C[You lost points, unnessaccerily...];W[ac]C[Black wins by 9 moku!])
(;W[ad]C[Black could capture A6 as it's in an atari, but B7 is better reduces white territory even more..];B[bc]C[White clearly lost - A6 is captured (Can't escape) and white's territory has been reduced..])
(;W[ag]C[Black could capture A6 as it's in an atari, but B7 is better reduces white territory even more..];B[bc]C[White clearly lost - A6 is captured (Can't escape, nor can it make life) and white's territory has been reduced..])))
